ucutils.options.car.general.fast_find.to: Finds your car immediately when execution '/car find'
ucutils.options.car.general.fast_lock.to: Locks the car immediately when execution '/car lock'
ucutils.options.car.general.highlight.to: Highlights your car when you exit it
ucutils.options.car.automation.lock.name: Automated locking
ucutils.options.car.automation.lock.tool: Locks the car automatically when you start the engine
ucutils.options.car.automation.start.too: Starts the car automatically when you enter it
ucutils.options.nametag.a_duty.name: Admin duty
ucutils.options.nametag.a_duty.tooltip: Shows an information above the players name of players in admin duty
ucutils.options.nametag.afk.name: AFK
ucutils.options.nametag.afk.tooltip: Shows an information above the players name of afk players
ucutils.options.nametag.house_ban.name: House ban
ucutils.options.nametag.house_ban.toolti: Shows an information above the players name of players with a house ban
ucutils.options.nametag.outlaw.name: Outlaw
ucutils.options.nametag.outlaw.tooltip: Shows an information above the players name of outlaw players
ucutils.options.nametag.medical_informat: Shows the cooldown of bandages and pills below the players name
ucutils.options.reinforcement_style.name: Reinforcement style
ucutils.options.atm_information.name: ATM information
ucutils.options.atm_information.value.no: Do not show additional bank information
ucutils.options.atm_information.value.bo: Shows both your faction and group bank balances
ucutils.options.hydration.name: Hydration display
ucutils.options.hydration.tooltip: Displays your hydration above your hunger bar
ucutils.options.check_unicacity_server.t: Checks if you are playing on the UnicaCity server. If enabled, certain features will only be available on the UnicaCity server to prevent issues on other servers.
ucutils.options.faction_chat_color.name: Faction chat color
ucutils.options.faction_chat_color.toolt: Changes the color of the faction chat
ucutils.options.widgets.car_locked.optio: Shows whether your car is locked or unlocked
ucutils.options.widgets.date_time.option: Shows the current date and time
ucutils.options.widgets.hearth.options.t: Shows the hearth amount and the absorption state
ucutils.options.widgets.money.options.to: Shows your current money on the hand and in the bank
ucutils.options.widgets.payday.options.t: Shows information about the next PayDay
ucutils.options.widgets.payday.options.s: Shows predicted PayDay salary from part time jobs
ucutils.options.widgets.payday.options.e: Shows experience gained since last PayDay
ucutils.options.widgets.service_count.op: Shows the number of active services
ucutils.screen.data_usage_confirmation.m: UCUtils sends and receives data from an external server. This is required for certain features to function properly. By clicking Agree, you agree to this data usage.
ucutils.screen.faction.button.equip.name: Equip
ucutils.select_state.always.name: Always
ucutils.select_state.state.name: State
ucutils.select_state.state.tooltip: Executed only when the player is in a state faction
ucutils.select_state.none.name: None
ucutils.select_medic.always.name: Always
ucutils.select_medic.medic.name: Medic
ucutils.select_medic.medic.tooltip: Executed only when the player is in the medic faction
ucutils.select_medic.none.name: None
ucutils.sound.bank_robbery.name: Bank robbery
ucutils.sound.bank_robbery.tooltip: Plays a sound when a bank robbery is started
ucutils.sound.bomb.name: Bomb
ucutils.sound.contract_set.name: Contract set
ucutils.sound.contract_set.tooltip: Plays a sound when a contract is set
ucutils.sound.contract_fulfilled.name: Contract fulfilled
ucutils.sound.contract_fulfilled.tooltip: Plays a sound when a contract is fulfilled
ucutils.sound.service.name: Service
ucutils.sound.service.tooltip: Plays a sound when a service comes in
ucutils.sound.fire.name: Fire
ucutils.sound.report.name: Report
ucutils.sound.report.tooltip: Plays a sound when a report comes in
ucutils.sound.notification.name: Notification
ucutils.sound.notification.tooltip: Plays a sound when a UCUtils notification comes in
